content:textarea:2:94.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:2:94.html: The Salvation Army of Wake County issues clothing vouchers to 35 different families each week. Families/individuals are able to shop for each person in their household at The Salvation Army Family Store. Only Wake County residents are eligible.
content:textarea:2:94.content: The Salvation Army of Wake County issues clothing vouchers to 35 different families each week. Families/individuals are able to shop for each person in their household at The Salvation Army Family Store. Only Wake County residents are eligible.

content:wysiwyg_basic:4:57.name: WYSIWYG
content:wysiwyg_basic:4:57.html:
• Call 919-834-6733 on Friday at 8 am to schedule an appointment for Monday. Appointments on Monday are between 9 am and noon.
  • Appointments can be made up to one week in advance.
  • Vouchers are $30 per individual April - September and $35 October - March and can only be used to shop in our Family Store.
  • Clothing assistance can be given every six months.
  • From October through February, free coats are available to those receiving vouchers.
